{{Infobox character
| name = Raion Raithe
| introduced = The Captain
| name = Raion Raithe
| aliases = Raion
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Captain, Knight of The Last Horizon, Knight of the Titan Force, Titan Knight, Red Knight, Visiri warrior
| abilities = Aetheric Combat Art, Dance of a Burning World, Combat Art, crimson energy, summon a Divine Titan, channel the power of friendship
| affiliations = Titan Knights, The Last Horizon, Titan Force
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Raion Raithe Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion Raithe is a red-skinned warrior and a [[Knight of The Last Horizon]]. A member of the [[Titan Force]], he is also identified as a red [[Titan Knight]] and a [[Combat Artist]]. While analysts have suggested his skills are best suited for mechs, arena combat, or piloting, he possesses adaptive systems that allow him to fulfill various roles. He is capable of wielding a [[force-blade]] and utilizing [[Combat Arts]], such as the [[Dance of a Burning World]]. He is also linked to a modified [[Divine Titan]] known as Neth’therith. Physically, Raion is characterized by his white hair and three eyes. He has a history of dissecting massive insectoid creatures and navigating spacecraft through gore, though he has shown vulnerability to humanoid monsters. Despite appearing somewhat naive, he possesses a sense of pride and conviction, often declaring his belief in the [[Horizon]] or his allies. He was exiled from the [[Raithe family]], a lineage that includes his brother Ryzer, a diplomat. In combat, Raion has engaged in aerial battles against [[Advocates]] and has been known to challenge opponents to duels.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion Raithe is a [[Visiri]] mage and [[Titan Knight]] characterized by his scarlet skin, white hair, and three eyes, including a golden eye on his forehead. A former member of the [[Titan Force]] and current [[Knight of The Last Horizon]], this elite combatant has spent much of his career killing monsters and dissecting moon-sized insectoid creatures. As the sole living master of the Aetheric [[sword]] art [[Dance of a Burning World]], he utilizes a red [[force-blade]] and crimson energy to fight, often appearing as a red flash surrounded by a burning [[aura]]. During his service, he piloted a [[Divine Titan]] mech, though he struggled with mental seals and lost control of the machine when it was on the verge of destruction. Now a member of the crew on the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]], Raion continues to serve as a skilled warrior and friend to the narrator.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a character with bright red skin and a golden eye in his forehead.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has three eyes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] is a fighter with scarlet skin, a third eye of brilliant gold, and white hair.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion wears a red combat suit.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a mage.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion wants to be the Captain.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is considered one of the best personal combatants in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a [[Visiri]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has mastered an [[Aetheric Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion can move in a red flash.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is surrounded by a burning crimson aura.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion can use crimson energy.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion can summon a [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is the only living master of the Aetheric [[sword]] art [[Dance of a Burning World]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion uses a [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion's [[force-blade]] is a three-foot laser-edged plane of bright red light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] is a member of the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] is a [[Knight of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion was formerly a Knight of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion was standing with the narrator and [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a friend of the narrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion possesses a plasma pistol.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] can use [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] wields a [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] is a character who met [[Sola Kalter]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion picks up freelance bounty contracts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]]'s request is to defend the galaxy from [[Esh’kinaar]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is one of the few people who saw the end of the digital selection tournament.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Varic has fought Raion in virtual space.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has spent much of his career dissecting moon-sized insectoid creatures.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c26">''The Captain'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a character who has no problem killing monsters.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion wears crimson armor and uses a scarlet [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion picked up the narrator and flew to a [[Vallenar Corporation]] ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a crew member [[Horizon]] intends to recall.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has crimson eyes and a third golden eye.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a character who can be sympathetic to others' mourning.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is in better physical shape than he was previously.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion can slash ships in half.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has veins of sunlight-colored energy running over his skin.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33">''The Captain'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a [[Visiri]] warrior and a [[Titan Knight]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion was the pilot inside the [[Divine Titan]] mech.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion likely broke several ribs during the fall.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has a unique ability to channel the power of friendship through bonds with those who trust him.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has fought alongside the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] cannot freely pilot his [[Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c34">''The Captain'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a character on the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion was almost chosen to be the [[Engineer]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has a crimson bicep.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion tried to control his [[Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion believes that Sola and the narrator are motivated by a fear of dying for nothing.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion is a member of the crew.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion wears a red-plated combat suit without a helmet.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion controls a [[Titan]] and uses a [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] possesses a [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43">''The Captain'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion has mental seals to keep his mind intact.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion lost control of his [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion's [[Divine Titan]] is a mech that was cracked and on the verge of destruction.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] is a member of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47">''The Captain'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion believes the [[Iron King]] is dead.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A red-skinned [[Visiri man]] with white hair and a golden third eye, Raion Raithe is a [[Knight of The Last Horizon]] and a former member of the [[Titan Force]]. During his service, he utilized his [[Combat Art]] to engage a slipwraith and physically hold two decks of his ship together, even demonstrating the ability to call [[Divine Titans]] while within [[Subspace]]. After tearing [[Starhammer]] apart and dividing an [[Undermaker]] ship with a sheet of fire, the skilled [[Combat Artist]] emerged onto the surface of [[Nyron Seven]]. Following various battles against [[Advocates]] and a mission to save his best friend, Raion remains focused on defeating the [[D’Niss Swarm]]-[[Queen]] [[Esh’kinaar]] and will not rest until the narrator is free.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a crew member who can perform physical exercises at high speeds.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] is a [[Knight of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] is a [[Visiri man]] with red skin and white hair.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] possesses a golden third eye.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] swore he would not interfere.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion intends to defend the galaxy from the return of the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c5">''The Engineer'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a crew member on [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9">''The Engineer'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a crew member tasked with engaging the slipwraith.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is physically holding two decks of [[The Last Horizon]] together.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a character who can use [[Combat Art]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is capable of calling [[Divine Titans]] while inside [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is unhurt and assisting the [[Karoshan]] engineering team.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion can be stalled by [[Voidhoppers]] moving in and out of [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion stated that they saved everyone from attacking the [[Karoshan ships]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] fought in a match against normal [[Advocates]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion's request was to defeat [[Swarm-Queen]] [[Esh’kinaar]] of the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion remained quiet during the interaction between Shyrax and Mell.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] has red skin and white hair.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22">''The Engineer'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] has three eyes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion has a broad smile.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Captain does not feel much older than Raion.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a Knight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a member of the crew and was previously in the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is a Knight who uses a massive hydraulic press for training.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion uses a self-contained treadmill with external speakers.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is considered insurance against [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] is a red [[Titan Knight]] and a skilled [[Combat Artist]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion tore [[Starhammer]] apart.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is currently repairing his combat suit.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion suggests talking to [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion emerged from [[Horizon]]’s teleportation onto the surface of [[Nyron Seven]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]]'s [[Combat Art]] is the [[Dance of a Burning World]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion slashed his hand from left to right, creating a sheet of fire that divided [[Undermaker's ship]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion reached the shuttle sent for him.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion bargained onto a transport ship to save his best friend.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion has a crimson face.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion will not rest until the narrator is free.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] battles in the sky with [[Advocates]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion is fighting [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c53">''The Engineer'', chapter 53</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion Raithe is an immensely talented original [[Titan Knight]] and the [[Captain of the Titan Knights]] who pilots the [[Red Divine Titan]]. Despite being exiled from his family, he serves as a mentor to [[Omega]] and conducts tests for [[The Last Horizon]], such as evaluating Shyrax. While performing diplomatic work on [[Visiria]], he was forced to evacuate during the [[D’Niss invasion]]. During combat, Raion utilizes his [[Combat Art]], the [[Dance of a Burning World]], alongside a [[force-blade]] and a crimson flame shield. Though he was nearly lost to [[Hesh’ellik]] and required significant time to recover, he continues to fight alongside the narrator as a [[Red]] Knight.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a [[Titan Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion bolted down the hallway.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is someone [[Omega]] takes lessons from regarding having faith in friends.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator needs to check on Raion.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion tested Shyrax for her application to [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is capable of igniting his energy to blast through crowds at full speed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6">''The Knight'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a Knight who uses a [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion was fighting without his helmet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is addressed as Captain.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a character who met the narrator after his ritual.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion has a third eye that glows gold when scanning.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion Raithe]] is the [[Captain of the Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion Raithe]]'s [[aura]] is pure scarlet and resembles a thin layer of flame.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion was exiled from the [[Raithe family]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion has immense natural talent.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion's parents retired off-planet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion's brother was a senatorial aide and intends to become a Senator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion wears a [[Titan Force]] uniform.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is the brother of [[Ryzer Raithe]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion has a brother.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is someone whose questions the narrator would expect.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is someone Varic intends to speak with regarding his findings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is someone the narrator needs to tell about the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a person who fits the description of a [[Gatekeeper]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is on a mission.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is referred to as [[Red]] by the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion uses the [[Dance of a Burning World]] technique.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Several planets evacuated ahead of the [[D’Niss invasion]], including Raion.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is working alone on [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion's full name is [[Raion Raithe]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion's [[Combat Art]] is the [[Dance of a Burning World]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion won the second round of his fights.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is on [[Visiria]] doing diplomatic work.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion's voice was heard through the ship's wall speakers.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion was a warrior.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a fighter who previously fought Mua.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion was covered in thick bandages.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion was one of the original [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion's medical room is equipped with a massive drill and a military-grade laser.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32">''The Knight'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion wanted to go back.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion was almost lost to [[Hesh’ellik]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion cannot take on a [[D’Niss]] with the [[Dance of a Burning World]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a crew member of [[The Last Horizon]] who was not at his post.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King Regent]] [[Felrex]]'s [[Combat Art]] was worthy of Raion in the [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is someone the narrator might need to seek forgiveness from.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion needs time to recover.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is from the planet [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion has a console that can be controlled via telekinesis.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is in no shape to pilot.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is the pilot of the [[Red Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a companion that the Captain intends to go after.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion had not yet reached [[Esh’kinaar]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a pilot who fights alongside the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion is a [[Red]] Knight.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion uses a [[force-blade]] and a shield of crimson flame.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Raion has a private constellation of stars.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion Raithe is a scarlet-skinned, three-eyed ally of [[Omega]] who accompanies the narrator and has grown more capable since his battle with the [[Iron King]]. During a mission, he promised to locate missing components and utilized a mech to manage the ship's shields by supplementing them with crimson energy, even as he tended to a damaged [[Divine Titan]] covered in golden veins. While wearing an armored uniform and white gloves, he piloted the [[Red]] [[Titan]] and later attempted to persuade [[Horizon]] to allow his return to the fight. Following a recent return from [[Shadow Ark]], Raion found himself fighting Aila's daughter after his mech was disabled. Though he is not currently aboard the ship, the Captain anticipates his imminent arrival, noting that Raion is a person who follows his own sense of righteousness and once made a request that led Varic to spare Ryzer's life.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is a three-eyed individual who accompanies the narrator.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator suspects [[Rellask]] has 'seen too much Raion' in him.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion puts his fists on his hips.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion promises they will find the missing components.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion uses a mech.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion put his hands on [[Omega]]’s shoulder and guided him away from the console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion manages the ship's shields.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion uses crimson energy to supplement the ship's shields.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion has a damaged [[Divine Titan]] covered in golden veins.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion has scarlet skin.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion wears white gloves.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is not currently aboard the ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain wishes Raion were present.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is expected to arrive soon.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is doing what he thinks is right.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Raion Raithe]] is a person whose request led Varic to spare Ryzer's life.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is piloting the [[Red]] [[Titan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion wears an armored uniform.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion has grown more capable since fighting the [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion expresses trust in Sola.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion recently returned from [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion announced that [[Omega]] will find out.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is a person the narrator leaves one-on-one showdowns to.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is fighting Aila's daughter and his mech is down.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion is an ally of [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion would not conquer planets.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Raion was trying to persuade [[Horizon]] to let him back into the fight.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“It’s always good to have a mage aboard, though.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“I’m going to be the Captain!” he declared.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“You’re not scared of dying,” Raion said confidently. Sola’s eye twitched and she turned to say something, but Raion continued before she could. “You’re scared of dying for nothing. Just like me.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Raion put a hand on my shoulder. “He’s dead.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Raion Raithe, Knight of The Last Horizon!” he announced.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titan Knights]]
[[Category:Titan Force]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Mages]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
